text.title: Communications Management Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Communications Management applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Engagement: acme-platform. Stakeholder groups: sponsor, exec-comm, eng-team, design-team, vendor-A, client-buyer. Sample matrix rows: - sponsor / status report / email / U_PM / weekly / 1-page md / U_HEAD_OF_DELIVERY - eng-team / sprint review / meeting / U_EM / biweekly / 30min demo / U_PM - client-buyer / monthly digest / email / U_CSM / monthly / 2-page md / U_VP_CS Decision log at ./decision-log.md (immutable; pre-commit hook forbids row deletion). Meeting cadence: - weekly status (Mondays) owner U_PM - sprint review (biweekly) owner U_EM - monthly steering (first Tuesday) owner U_SPONSOR
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
